data.title: Cloud Integration
data.description: Microsoft's infrastructure is heavily integrated with its Azure cloud services, allowing seamless data and application operations across its platforms.

data.title: Scalable Web Architecture
data.description: The website employs scalable web technologies to handle large volumes of traffic efficiently through load balancers and distributed servers.

data.title: Microservices
data.description: Microservices architecture allows Microsoft.com to introduce new features and services independently without affecting the entire system.

data.title: API Management
data.description: Robust API management systems ensure smooth communication between client-side and server-side applications.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: The site is designed responsively to adapt its layout across a variety of devices and screen sizes.
